text:
Created attachment 205752
BusyBox v4 patch

Here we are :)

Changes from the prev. version:

CROND applet ported
NSLOOKUP applert ported
NTPD server and client applets ported
PING and PING6 applets ported
Mailutils (sendmail, makemime, etc.) applets ported
KLOGD applet ported
